Golden Carnival Mystery Week - Last Day to Submit Golden Tickets!

The Mystery Week, and last week of the Golden Carnival, is tomorrow! Here's a countdown to the start of the Loot Drop: 

IMPORTANT: After tomorrow, Golden Ticket 2624s will have no official use case. Make sure too use them while you still can!

 | Purchase Golden Tickets from other players: https://play.staratlas.com/market/GT24XW4QvPxm1Dj63kYQMVa2nwwReLtcWXyHzA6G4yRw/
 | Submit your Golden Tickets here: https://staratlas.hedgehog.markets/
